data.body:
Sorry, the reply is so late.
I understand.Thanks for your reply.
Than this PR can be over?
Thank you for the help.

@bennn 

Sorry, it's a free translation.

I think `for defining programs` in `Interface Essentials` means "edit source file (编辑源文件)".
In my opinion, `define` is used to define functions, not a whole program.

data.title: revise some translate
data.body:
A little bit change

`使用简体中文作DrRacket界面语言` -> `使用简体中文作为DrRacket界面语言`
`无用的require`-> `无效的require`
`使用高亮突出`-> `使用高亮显示错误`
`"警告：定义视窗改变了。请单击“运行”`-> ` "警告：程序文件改变了。请单击“运行”。`
Ok , I will be see what can I do.Thank you.

data.title: Chinese version is inappropriate
data.body:
If I use a define without Run,IDE show me a message
`警告：定义视窗改变了。请单击运行`
I think it's inappropriate, maybe we can show as
`警告：请点击运行以更新定义`
or something better.
